name: List of Cambridge University Cricket Club players
fullName: List of Cambridge University Cricket Club players
profileSummary: This is a list in alphabetical order of cricketers who have played for Cambridge University Cricket Club (CUCC) in top-class matches since the club was established in 1820. Until 2020, a number of CUCC matches had first-class cricket status. In 1972 and 1974 the team also played official List A cricket matches.
